dialogos.texto_en: So this is it!\nThe luxury resort hotel!
It looks like a castle...
You both have your mouths open.
Awww!\nRaiha-chan looking pouty is so cute!
H-hey, are we really staying here?\nIs it okay for us to even BE here?
We already made a proper reservation, ok?
That's not what I meant!\nDo you guys always book such luxurious hotels?
Well, it's a bit more extravagant than usual.\nBut since it's our graduation trip,\nmaybe my dad decided to splurge a bit.
Wow, only by a bit huh.\nThe Nakano family must be rich, after all.
Also, the location is great for sightseeing,\nand they have varieties of activities\nand tours available. It's really convenient.
By the way, the restaurant has a variety of cuisines,\nall of them are highly recommended.\nOf course, the desserts too!
I heard that the night view from the lounge is also amazing.\nLet's go see it at night!
*sigh*
(What a flood of information...)
(According to the brochure, there's an indoor pool\n and a fitness center as well.\n I can't believe such a hotel exists...)
Oh no, I'm feeling dizzy.\nThis expensive aura is too overwhelming for us commoners.
Huh?
Now, Miku, your boyfriend\nlooks like he's having a hard time. Take care of him.
HUH?!
I-Ichika!\nDon't say stuff like that!
But it's true, right?\nYou guys could be a bit more touchy, you know?
A-absolutely not!\nEven though you're dating,\nplease behave yourself, Uesugi-kun!
I know, I know.\nBesides, we're not at that stage or anything now, right?
Futaro.\nIf there's anything\nyou're unsure about, just tell me.
Yeah, sorry, but I'll have to rely on you.\nI don't know anything about the manners or customs\nfor places like this.
I don't think there's anything you need to worry about. Just act as your usual self.
I don't know how to act like my usual self...
Just don't stress too much\nand just treat it like any other trip.
If that's the case, why didn't you book something more normal like a ryokan instead? Here, we have these\nunnecessarily large beds instead of a simple tatami and futon.
Do you prefer ryokan over hotels, Futaro-kun?
Well, in that case, maybe we should have gone\nto a Japanese-style inn like Miku suggested.
You really do understand Uesugi-san, don't you, Miku!
Eh-ah, oohh...\nUm... That's not what I mean...
Miku's always liked the traditional japanese style...
Then, you guys are a match!\nHee hee!
(Hmm?\n Did Miku distance herself from me just now?)
Well then, shall we head to our rooms now?\nWe've been standing here talking for ages.
Okay, let's decide on the room allocations.\nWe booked four twin bedded rooms, right?
(Twin bedded rooms...)
(H-hey, Futaro. Don't start imagining things.\n Like sharing a room with Miku or something\n totally unacceptable.)
I-I'll room with Nino!
Eh.
Huh? With me?
Yes! Nino and I!
I don't really mind, but, are you okay with that, Miku?
Yeah! I'm looking forward to it!
Fine then, okay, Miku and I will share a room.
Thanks...
(N-no, this is fine. It's not like it was a shock\n that Miku wasn't planning on sharing a room with me!)
(Yeah, it's not an issue at all!)
Okay, okay, okaaay!\nIf I may make a request,\nI'd like to be in the same room with Raiha-chan!
I'd like to room with you too, Yotsuba-san.\nIt's a rare opportunity, after all.
Woo-hoo! Thank you so much!
In that case, I'll be rooming with Itsuki-chan.
As for you, Futaro-kun,\nyou'll be spending the night alone in Okinawa.
I don't have any complaints.\nAfter all, I'm the only guy here.
Really?\nDidn't you have a disappointed look on your face\nearlier?
I-I-I-I DIDN'T?!
Uesugi-kun?\nI'll say it again.\nPlease behave yourself.
You guys make such a fuss every single time!!!
(Again?)
Come on, let's stop fussing about it and move already.\nOh, right, isn't it dinner time soon?
Y-yeah.
Aren't we gonna eat dinner after this?
Yes, we have dinner reservations\nat the hotel restaurant.\nIt's Okinawan cuisine, of course.
I'm so excited!
But we still have some time.\nWould you like to take a break in our rooms?
Hmm.\nWell, I'm a bit tired, so I'll rest for a bit.
What am I gonna do?\nI'm not that tired yet...
Kokusai dori is nearby, so how about we go there?\nHow about a walk, Futaro-kun?
Kokusai dori...\nthat's the main street in Naha, right?
Yeah yeah, there are a lot of shops there.\nWe have plans on visiting them tomorrow,\nbut we'll only make a quick trip there.
Yeah, I don't mind.
Alright, Miku, you as well%p-2;――
Nino.\nI want to rest too, so let's go to our room.
Sure.\nIf you're okay with that.
Oh my.\nMiku's gone.
(Miku's acting a little strange lately...\n Is she just tired?)
Since we've come all the way to Okinawa,\nit's natural for her to be tired.
That's right. The climate here is different from Honshu, and our bodies haven't adjusted yet either.
I think I'll also take it easy in my room.\nI'm sorry for inviting you out\nand then changing my mind, Futaro-kun.
Oh, nah, it's alright.
I'll also go with Ichika to our room.
What shall we do, Raiha-chan?
Why don't we chill in our room?
Ok then, let's meet up at the restaurant when it's time.
Roger!
